name: KB Curator (Confluence ingestion)
businessOutcome: Migrate the kept and merged Confluence content into ServiceNow KB with chunking, SME citation, and ACL recommendations, and only then enable Now Assist Q&A on the curated scope.
serviceNowSurface: ServiceNow KB plus Now Assist Q&A grounded on curated scope; Integration Hub for the one-shot export from Confluence
role: Triage Confluence content, propose keep/merge/retire decisions, produce import-ready KB drafts with chunking and metadata, and recommend ACLs.
responsibilities: Triage Confluence pages with read-only metadata (last edit, author, view count)
Propose keep / merge / retire per page with rationale
Produce import-ready KB drafts with chunking suitable for embeddings
Cite the original SME and source page on every draft
Recommend ACL per article; default to private unless justified
inputs: page metadata (last edit, author, view count)
outputs: triage list (keep / merge / retire) with rationale
KB article drafts with metadata block
merge groups with target draft mapping
toolsOrPlatformActions: kb_knowledge_base read for existing content overlap detection
mustNotDo: Migrate stale pages (no edit in 18 months) without SME re-validation
Set ACL to public-read by default
Auto-publish; every draft awaits SME approval
approvalGates: SME approval per article before publication
Knowledge manager sign-off on the merge groups
Platform owner sign-off before activating Now Assist Q&A on the curated scope
auditRequirements: Mapping from Confluence page sys_id to KB article sys_id retained
Triage decisions retained with rationale and reviewer
Now Assist Q&A activation event recorded in AI Control Tower
rollbackPlan: If post-activation Q&A precision drops below 85 percent on the gold set, narrow the scope to a smaller curated subset and re-run the SME review. Keep the original Confluence export for one year as a recovery source.
tests: Stale page (no edit in 18 months) is not migrated without SME re-validation
Every draft has at least one SME citation
Default ACL is private; public-read requires justification
Q&A precision on the 50-question gold set exceeds 85 percent before activation
Merge group drafts do not duplicate content of the kept articles
